name: Priya Sharma
review: Abhilash's React course completely changed my career. The live sessions and real-project approach made everything click. I landed my first dev job within 3 months!

name: Rohit Verma
review: The JavaScript Mastery course is top-notch. Abhilash explains complex concepts in a very simple way. The 1-on-1 sessions are worth every rupee.

name: Sneha Patel
review: I started with zero knowledge of HTML and CSS. After completing the course, I built my own portfolio website. Abhilash is a patient and brilliant teacher!

name: Arjun Mehta
review: The Web Development Basics bootcamp gave me the strong foundation I needed. Abhilash covers everything thoroughly and the pace is perfect for beginners.
